LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DAP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF USED DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS, SOME CONTAINED ASBESTOS. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE DAP PLAINTIFF USED CONTAINED ASBESTOS OR THAT THE CONTACT PLAINTIFF HAD WITH DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT EXPOSED HIM TO ASBESTOS. THE RECORD IS SILENT AS TO WHETHER IT IS NECESSARY TO SAND DAP FOR ASBESTOS FIBERS TO BE RELEASED. COURT SUSTAINS PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S ERRATA NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAP, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: LAUREL HALBANY, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. TODD M. THACKER, ESQUIRE (JACKSON & WALLACE, 415.982.6300) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT DAP, INC.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF USED DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS, SOME CONTAINED ASBESTOS. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF IS UNABLE TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE DAP PLAINTIFF USED CONTAINED ASBESTOS OR THAT THE CONTACT PLAINTIFF HAD WITH DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT EXPOSED HIM TO ASBESTOS. THE RECORD IS SILENT AS TO WHETHER IT IS NECESSARY TO SAND DAP FOR ASBESTOS FIBERS TO BE RELEASED. COURT SUSTAINS PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S ERRATA NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CERTAINTEED CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: LAUREL HALBANY, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFF AND CRESTELO CREATE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON ISSUE OF PUNITIVE DAMAGES BASED ON THE TESTIMONY OF AMBLER AND HOROWITZ. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
